meaning: adj.容易的,要求不高的,不严格的
examples: After the first pair of tasks was completed, one group of participants was assigned an undemanding activity intended to cause their minds to wander.
Relatively undemanding milestones will quite soon take Fiat’s stake in Chrysler up to 35%.
This allows them to take root in undemanding applications within a new market or arena of competition.
Relatively undemanding milestones will quite soon take Fiat's stake in Chrysler up to 35%.
Of course, this is hardly an undemanding agenda for a Chad or a Cambodia.
